
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

set.seed(4420)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("used_cars_cleaned.csv")
cat("Rows loaded:", nrow(df), "\n")
```

```{r}
df_model <- df[, c("price", "mileage", "horsepower")]
df_model <- na.omit(df_model)

#removing outliers
df_model <- df_model[df_model$price >= 1500 & df_model$price <= 150000, ]
cat("Rows after cleaning:", nrow(df_model), "\n")
```

```{r}
N_SAMPLE <- 2000
df_sample <- df_model[sample(nrow(df_model), N_SAMPLE), ]

# train/test
train_size <- round(0.8 * nrow(df_sample))
train <- df_sample[1:train_size, ]
test  <- df_sample[(train_size + 1):nrow(df_sample), ]

cat("Train:", nrow(train), ", Test:", nrow(test), "\n")
```

```{r}
mile_mean <- mean(train$mileage)
mile_sd <- sd(train$mileage)
hp_mean <- mean(train$horsepower)
hp_sd <- sd(train$horsepower)
price_mean <- mean(train$price)
price_sd <- sd(train$price)

X_train <- cbind(
  1,
  (train$mileage - mile_mean) / mile_sd,
  (train$horsepower - hp_mean) / hp_sd
)
y_train <- (train$price - price_mean) / price_sd

X_test <- cbind(
  1,
  (test$mileage - mile_mean) / mile_sd,
  (test$horsepower - hp_mean) / hp_sd
)
y_test <- (test$price - price_mean) / price_sd
```

```{r}
# the likelihood
likelihood <- function(beta, sigma, X, y) {
  mu <- X %*% beta
  prod(dnorm(y, mean = mu, sd = sigma))
}

# the prior
prior <- function(beta, sigma) {
  if (sigma <= 0) return(0)
  dnorm(beta[1], 0, 1) * dnorm(beta[2], 0, 1) * dnorm(beta[3], 0, 1)
}


log_posterior <- function(beta, sigma, X, y) {
  if (sigma <= 0) return(-Inf)
  mu <- X %*% beta
  log_lik <- sum(dnorm(y, mean = mu, sd = sigma, log = TRUE))
  log_pri <- sum(dnorm(beta, 0, 1, log = TRUE))
  log_lik + log_pri
}
```

```{r}
#  metropolis algo
metropolis_sampling_bayesian <- function(X, y, n = 10000, sigma_prop = 0.015, burn = 0.18) {
  samples <- list()
  beta <- c(0, 0, 0)
  sigma <- 1
  total_samples <- as.integer(n / (1 - burn))
  m <- as.integer(total_samples * burn)
  accepted <- 0

  current_log_post <- log_posterior(beta, sigma, X, y)

  while (length(samples) < total_samples) {
    beta_prop <- rnorm(3, beta, sigma_prop)
    sigma_prop_val <- rnorm(1, sigma, sigma_prop)

    prop_log_post <- log_posterior(beta_prop, sigma_prop_val, X, y)
    alpha <- exp(prop_log_post - current_log_post)

    if (runif(1) < alpha) {
      beta <- beta_prop
      sigma <- sigma_prop_val
      current_log_post <- prop_log_post
      accepted <- accepted + 1
    }
    samples[[length(samples) + 1]] <- c(beta, sigma)
  }

  acceptance_rate <- accepted / total_samples
  cat(sprintf('Acceptance rate: %.3f\n', acceptance_rate))

  samples <- do.call(rbind, samples)
  samples <- samples[(m + 1):nrow(samples), ]
  return(samples)
}
```

```{r}
# generate the samples
samples_bayes <- metropolis_sampling_bayesian(X_train, y_train)
nrow(samples_bayes)
```

```{r}
plot(samples_bayes[,1], type = "l", main = "Convergence of beta0 (intercept)")
plot(samples_bayes[,2], type = "l", main = "Convergence of beta1 (mileage)")
plot(samples_bayes[,3], type = "l", main = "Convergence of beta2 (horsepower)")
plot(samples_bayes[,4], type = "l", main = "Convergence of sigma")
```

```{r}
acf(samples_bayes[,1], main = "beta0 ACF")
acf(samples_bayes[,2], main = "beta1 ACF")
acf(samples_bayes[,3], main = "beta2 ACF")
```

```{r}
thinned_samples <- samples_bayes[seq(1, nrow(samples_bayes), by = 10), ]

acf(thinned_samples[, 2], main = "beta1 (thinned) ACF")
acf(thinned_samples[, 3], main = "beta2 (thinned) ACF")
```

```{r}
# posterior 

posterior_mean <- colMeans(thinned_samples)
print(posterior_mean)
```

```{r}
sim_beta <- seq(-3, 3, length.out = 1000)
prior_dist <- dnorm(sim_beta, 0, 1)

plot_df <- data.frame(beta = sim_beta, Prior = prior_dist)
post_beta1 <- thinned_samples[,2]

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = plot_df, aes(x = beta, y = Prior, color = 'red')) +
  geom_density(data = data.frame(post = post_beta1), aes(x = post, color = 'purple')) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(post_beta1), color = "purple") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Prior vs Posterior for beta1 (mileage)",
       x = expression(beta[1]), y = expression(p(beta[1]))) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("red" = "red", "purple" = "purple"))

post_beta2 <- thinned_samples[,3]

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = plot_df, aes(x = beta, y = Prior, color = 'red')) +
  geom_density(data = data.frame(post = post_beta2), aes(x = post, color = 'purple')) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(post_beta2), color = "purple") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Prior vs Posterior for beta2 (horsepower)",
       x = expression(beta[2]), y = expression(p(beta[2]))) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("red" = "red", "purple" = "purple"))
```

```{r}
beta_samples <- thinned_samples[, 1:3]
sigma_samples <- thinned_samples[, 4]

pred_scaled <- X_test %*% t(beta_samples)
for (j in 1:ncol(pred_scaled)) {
  pred_scaled[, j] <- pred_scaled[, j] + rnorm(nrow(pred_scaled), 0, sigma_samples[j])
}

pred_mean_scaled <- rowMeans(pred_scaled)
ci_lower_scaled <- apply(pred_scaled, 1, quantile, probs = 0.05)
ci_upper_scaled <- apply(pred_scaled, 1, quantile, probs = 0.95)

pred_mean <- pred_mean_scaled * price_sd + price_mean
ci_lower <- ci_lower_scaled * price_sd + price_mean
ci_upper <- ci_upper_scaled * price_sd + price_mean

actual <- test$price
resid <- actual - pred_mean
```

```{r}
mae <- mean(abs(resid))
rmse <- sqrt(mean(resid^2))
r2 <- 1 - sum(resid^2) / sum((actual - mean(actual))^2)
coverage <- mean(actual >= ci_lower & actual <= ci_upper)

cat(sprintf("MAE: $%.2f\n", mae))
cat(sprintf("RMSE: $%.2f\n", rmse))
cat(sprintf("R-squared: %.4f\n", r2))
cat(sprintf("90%% CI Coverage: %.1f%%\n", coverage * 100))
```

```{r}
results_df <- data.frame(
  actual = actual,
  predicted = pred_mean,
  ci_lower = ci_lower,
  ci_upper = ci_upper
)

ggplot(results_df, aes(x = actual, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "purple", size = 1) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Bayesian Regression: Actual vs. Predicted Price",
       x = "Actual Price", y = "Predicted Price (Posterior Mean)")
```

```{r}
sample_df <- results_df[sample(nrow(results_df), 20), ]
sample_df$obs <- seq_len(20)

ggplot(sample_df, aes(x = obs)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), width = 0.3, color = "purple") +
  geom_point(aes(y = predicted, color = "Predicted"), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = actual, color = "Actual"), size = 2, shape = 4) +
  labs(title = "Sample Predictions with 90% Credible Intervals",
       x = "Observation", y = "Price") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "", values = c("Predicted" = "purple", "Actual" = "red"))
```
